message:
feat(security): add 45 Phase 3 security/policy invariant tests (bd-3ar8v.4.6)

Proves that Phase 3 performance optimizations (dual-exec oracle, io_uring
lanes, S3-FIFO admission, PolicySnapshot O(1) lookups) do not expand the
capability surface or bypass policy controls.

Invariants tested:
- PolicySnapshot O(1) lookup matches evaluate_for() for all known caps
- Per-extension overrides, unknown extensions, unknown capabilities
- 5-layer precedence chain preserved across all profiles
- Dangerous capability classification immutable (exec, env)
- IoUring lane cannot route exec/env, respects kill switch & queue budget
- S3-FIFO per-owner fairness isolation between extensions
- Secret broker exact/suffix/prefix matching + allowlist overrides
- Exec mediation presets correctly ordered
- Profile security ordering (Safe >= Standard >= Permissive)
- OPE gate rejects empty evidence and invalid propensities
- Cross-module security surface isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
